channel.title: NYT > Technology
channel.description: Technology industry news, commentary, and analysis, with reporting on big tech, startups, and internet culture. The New York Times is a hub for conversation about news and ideas.

item.title: Leaked Code for Anthropic’s Claude Code Tests Copyright Challenges in A.I. Era
item.description: Artificial intelligence tools are making it faster than ever to reproduce creative work. Does copyright even matter anymore?
item.dc:creator: Meaghan Tobin

media:content.media:credit: Grant Harder for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Sigrid Jin, a student at the University of British Columbia in Vancouver, Canada, used A.I. agents to rewrite leaked Anthropic code.
